task: I’m trying to put together a quick Christmas family outing plan in Yorkshire with Leeds as the base, so could you start on the Carriageworks Theatre site and find a Christmas time Leeds pantomime there, ideally the main festive panto, and note the show title, the venue name, and the full run of performance dates so I have one solid Leeds option to anchor everything around. Once you’ve got that, leave the actual show page open in its own tab so I can look at the artwork and dates myself, then go to Big Panto Guide and check the 2026 West Yorkshire listings and pull out the top three pantomime options with their show names, venues, and dates so I can see what Leeds is competing with nearby. After that, use Google to search for at least two Yorkshire Christmas pantomimes scheduled for 2026, and open the real event or venue pages in separate tabs so you can verify they’re live and capture the show name, venue, city, and performance dates from the actual listings rather than just the search results. When you’ve got those, compare the Leeds Carriageworks option against the wider West Yorkshire and Yorkshire shortlist and tell me whether Leeds still looks like the best anchor city for a family outing. Please ignore anything unrelated, and keep the Leeds page plus the two Yorkshire event pages open so I can compare them visually afterward.
grader_reasoning:
R1: success - The agent successfully navigated to the Carriageworks Theatre website, identified the "Jack and the Beanstalk" pantomime, and confirmed the performance dates (Fri 20 Nov 2026 to Sun 3 Jan 2027) using both the page content and structured metadata. The show page was kept open in a tab as requested. The extracted details (Show: Jack and the Beanstalk, Venue: Carriageworks Theatre, Dates: 20 Nov 2026 - 3 Jan 2027) are accurate and match the verified event information.

R2: success - The agent successfully navigated to the Big Panto Guide West Yorkshire 2026 listings page (Step 16). The snapshot of that page clearly displays multiple listings, including "Dr Seuss's How The Grinch Stole Christmas! The Musical" at Leeds Playhouse, "Beauty and the Beast" at Theatre Royal Wakefield, and "Rapunzel: The Rock 'n' Roll Panto" at City Varieties Music Hall. The agent extracted these three options, including their show names, venues, and dates, in its final summary (Step 25). The requirement to use the Big Panto Guide and extract three entries with matching details is satisfied.

R3: success - The agent successfully searched for and verified two Yorkshire Christmas pantomimes for 2026. Specifically, it opened the event page for "Aladdin" at the Victoria Theatre in Halifax (tab 2) and "Sleeping Beauty" at the Harrogate Theatre in Harrogate (tab 3). The agent captured the show name, venue, city, and performance dates for both, as evidenced by the final summary and the action history showing the navigation to these specific event pages.

R4: success - The agent was tasked with keeping the Leeds Carriageworks page and two Yorkshire event pages open for visual comparison. According to the final action (step 25) and the tab list provided in step 23, the agent kept the following tabs open:
1. Carriageworks Leeds show page (https://www.carriageworkstheatre.co.uk/whats-on/jack-and-the-beanstalk-q15t)
2. Big Panto Guide West Yorkshire page
3. Victoria Theatre Halifax event page (https://www.victoriatheatre.co.uk/whats-on/aladdin)
4. Harrogate Theatre event page (https://www.harrogatetheatre.co.uk/events/sleeping-beauty-magical-family-pantomime/)

The requirement to keep the Leeds Carriageworks page and the two Yorkshire event pages open is satisfied.

R5: success - The agent provided a clear, structured comparison in its final response. It explicitly assessed the Leeds Carriageworks option ("Jack and the Beanstalk") against the West Yorkshire shortlist (Leeds Playhouse, Theatre Royal Wakefield, City Varieties) and the wider Yorkshire options (Victoria Theatre Halifax, Harrogate Theatre). It concluded with a reasoned recommendation that Leeds remains the best anchor city due to the concentration of high-quality options within the city itself. The verification requirement is fully met.
